feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: You should Never have let me Believe
entry.summary:
Author: Heyup_bro

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 53Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 0

Summary: When the round table crew get captured by a vengeful noble while on a hunt, things quickly turn sour with their captors and Merlin is forced to choose between revealing his magic and saving them all. Obviously, that is an incredibly easy question. All that’s left is to try clean up the mess he creates and get them out, while convincing those fearful of magic that he means no harm. Easy, right? THIS IS NOT YET STARTED AND UNFINISHED PLEASE SAVE FOR LATER IF YOU THINK ITS COOL!!This is my first fic so I hope you guys like it!! Based off of Tansyuduri’s fic ‘Return To Me’

entry.title: And you'll add my name to your long list of traitors...
entry.summary:
Author: mishahsim

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 696Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 47

entry.summary:
Author: kosmikowboj

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,870Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 71

entry.title: It Only Took Everyone Else Doing the Thinking
entry.summary:
Author: andromaex

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 750Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 13

Summary: Everyone in Camelot knows. Arthur and Merlin, however, are still aggressively committed to not noticing the obvious fact that they are hopelessly in love with each other. So the knights do what any reasonable group of exhausted friends would do: they intervene.

entry.title: Not A Gods Chosen - But A Gods Cursed
entry.summary:
Author: definitely_not_quackers

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,490Chapters: 10/10Kudos: 2

Summary: Merlin couldn't breathe He couldn't move He could barely hear Was this an illness? An injury? He wishes he knew If only the world would stop spinning just long enough that he could look around...   Merlin isn't having a fun time Author tortures Merlin (again)

entry.title: Where might someone hear this from?
entry.summary:
Author: WheatReceipt

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,636Chapters: 9/16Kudos: 108

Summary: A formidable creature of mythology destined to kill Arthur, or die trying. So why's it chasing its tail in the middle of Gaius' storeroom?“Cath palug.” Merlin looks up from the stale scraps of bread he’s trying to convince himself he wants to eat, staring blankly back at Gaius. “You what?”

entry.title: Master of Time: Advisor of Kings
entry.summary:
Author: jaqtkd

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,033Chapters: 5/11Kudos: 10

Summary: The 'Master of Time' Series: A group of stories about Merlin's life after 5x13 and how he comes to fully understand his Destiny and 'The Once and Future King' prophecies. Book 2: Many years have passed and Merlin is continuing to seek out his reincarnated friends and form friendships with their families whilst he eagerly awaits the most important re-birth of all. Much has changed but much remains the same. What role will Arthur play this time around and how can Merlin help? This story is non-linear and based on real, historical characters from the Ninth and Tenth Century so, enjoy the ride!

entry.title: Ezakıs and Humans
entry.summary:
Author: Merlin_In_The_Tavern

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 50,867Chapters: 13/?Kudos: 21

Summary: "Was there... was there truly a need for you to kiss me, Merlin?" "You were drowning, Arthur. Believe me, kissing a stubborn, ungrateful royal idiot was not on my itinerary today." One is an Ezaki, a prince searching for the Lake of Avalon to tear down the walls between their worlds. The other is a sorcerer, risking everything to seal the sword forever within its hidden waters. Beginning in Constantinople, the heart of the Eastern Roman Empire, and stretching deep into the Sassanid Empire to the ancient city of Gundeshapur—this is a journey set in 540 AD, where real historical events interweave with a high-stakes "Enemies to Lovers" romance. ✾ Long ago, as humans and Ezakis faced mutual destruction, their kings knelt before the sacred sword in the Lake of Avalon. A history written in blood was sealed with peace, and the Khazar Era began. Until Uther Pendragon rose to power and turned that peace to ash. Desperate, humanity turned back to Avalon. The lake's magic raised a colossal, insurmountable wall between the two realms. The magic was never to be broken; the gate, never opened. Yet, on the day the world tore in two, a power was born to change everything—Merlin.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: The Lake at the End of the World
entry.summary:
Author: LonelyWhovian

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,991Chapters: 6/20Kudos: 7

Summary: He is the Once and Future King. Take heart, for when Albion's need is greatest: Arthur will return. It is these words that keep Merlin at the shores of Avalon. Even centuries after the lake dried up, millennia after its true name was lost, Merlin stays, waiting for his King to return. *** Glastonbury Tor calls out in the dark, and some seek to answer.In between fighting for his life and trying to uncover what might cause the end of the world, Jon Sims stumbles across a mysterious selection of statements that point not only toward Glastonbury, but to the very heart of Arthurian Myth itself. *** Linked through nightmares and each grappling with the changes in the world around them, Merlin and Jon, with the help of their team, must uncover when Albion's need will be greatest, and what they can do to stop it.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Martin Blackwood/Jonathan "Jon" Sims | The Archivist

entry.title: Left Hand Man
entry.summary:
Author: queerer_things

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,913Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 101

Summary: When Arthur nearly dies by Lady Helen's dagger, Merlin uses magic to heal him. Unwilling to see Merlin executed for saving his life, Arthur turns a blind eye—but only under the condition that Merlin take on the role of his servant. What starts as "keeping his enemy closer" soon turns into completely redefining who his enemy is, as Merlin helps Arthur to unlearn his father's hatred. What then becomes camaraderie soon blossoms into much, much more. Series rewrite.

entry.title: The Eternity of Life
entry.summary:
Author: DragonTraining101

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 51,063Chapters: 25/?Kudos: 61

Summary: Merlin attempts to take his own life, but instead sets in motion a series of events the gods did not plan for. The gods are now scrambling to force a new prophecy. Faces from the past and present blur together as Merlin tries to save the world he wanted to leave.

entry.title: Ashes of Avalon
entry.summary:
Author: StuckatAzkaban

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,730Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 3

Summary: Someone has been out to get Merlin for years, so when they finally capture him, they wipe his memory, suppress his magic and strip him away from the boy he's been waiting for. Merlin is enrolled in what seems to be a boarding school for unwanted boys, but it's more like a prison where he feels constantly watched. He's the newest boy there for only a week until the blond boy he saved from a lake is standing in his dorm as his new roommate. Merlin blends in to survive, but his dreams take him to a different place, re-igniting some sort of electricity inside of him, and he soon realizes his roommate is the man he loved so long ago. With help, they realize someone has messed with Arthur's return timeline, forcing them to go back in time to "The Night Age" in 18th century to fix the world, and rightfully allow Arthur to finally become the Once and Future King, and return magic to Avalon, reuniting with friends when they get there.

entry.title: The Bond Series: Season 2: Episode 1 "Home Isn't Home"
entry.summary:
Author: Foreverwolf_6

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 110,895Chapters: 18/19Kudos: 16

Summary: Change is for the young, they say. Arthur and Merlin struggle to build their dream of Albion while facing old enemies from within, and a new enemy on the horizon threatens to destroy everything. Consequences for a choice made long ago rear, and others are made which may destroy them both. Are they strong enough to stand united, or will they falter?

entry.title: Wheels of Albion
entry.summary:
Author: rustystatic

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,459Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 4

Summary: Arthur Pendragon has spent his whole life on a skateboard. For him, skating is discipline, control and who he is.By his twenties, he’s already the best skater in the world and impossible to beat.But what happens when someone else enters the game? Merlin Emrys never meant to take skating seriously. For him, skating was freedom first, rules second. But the second he starts winning, the skateboarding world becomes obsessed with him just as quickly as it once became obsessed with Arthur.And just like that, skateboarding’s biggest rivalry is born.Their rivalry is wheels grinding against concrete, sparks flying every time they share a park.Arthur calls Merlin reckless.Merlin calls Arthur predictable.Commentators frame them as control vs chaos, king vs sorcerer. But behind broken skateparks and after-hours sessions, something shifts between them.Trash talk turns quieter. Challenges become dares. Arguments end too close. They’re rivals because the world demands it.But they become something else because neither of them can skate the same without the other

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Lancelot & Merlin (Merlin)
  • Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)

  • Slow Burn

  • maybe slightly out of character

entry.title: Destiny Shivers
entry.summary:
Author: Chaotic_Thirst_Goblin

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,100Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 14

Summary: Merlin knows better than anyone that Arthur belongs to Albion, legends, and a future already written prophecy and secrets. But he takes every moment as they come, and he and Arthur form a bond, and find love that might just change their destiny after all. This collection of 100-word drabbles will share tales about about magic, kisses, devotion, destiny, and the precarious experience of loving someone history thinks it's already claimed. Each one can be read on it's own. For the Come What May challenge on Tumblr.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Merlin (Merlin)
  • Drabbles
  • some will eventually be mature
  • 100 words each exactly
  • some are AU and some are canon compliant

entry.title: Pain is not weakness
entry.summary:
Author: KeeperOfDragons

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,540Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 10

Summary: Merlin hated being sick, being weak, unable to protect himself and those he cared for.It made him feel terribly useless, but even the strongest protectors need help sometimes, and that does not ever make one weak. or Merthur microfic prompt: Pain + Merlin Bingo: Camelot's Golden Age Or I give Merlin medieval ME/CFS

entry.title: The Prince, The Warlock and The Healer
entry.summary:
Author: Heratakescamelot

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 29,991Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 23

Summary: Hera was just looking for a way to escape her master's thesis and, more generally, the impending collapse of her adult life. She didn't expect the universe to take her so literally that it would hurl her straight into the Sixth Century.Trading academic deadlines for Uther Pendragon’s executioner's block was a trauma, but at least no one in Camelot is asking her if she’s finished her bibliography yet. Hidden away in Gaius’s chambers, Hera tries to navigate a world of ancient stones and fierce laws, where she quickly discovers she isn't just an intruder: she is the catalyst uncovering the unspeakable desires that bind Arthur Pendragon and Merlin to one another.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: My Medicine is Drowning Your Perspective Out
entry.summary:
Author: Idontknowguys

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,067Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 38

Summary: Merlin gets addicted to taking some of Gaius's pain relief potions while hiding his various injuries. He starts to wonder if maybe post-potion him is better than the sober version. Arthur, Gwen, Morgana, and the Knights find out... eventually. They're not happy. AKA: Dial Drunk by Noah Kahan
